prompt: Pure typographic GitHub README title banner. Solid single-color matte graphite background, no scene, no objects, no UI, no icon, no logo mark. The only visible text must be exactly "ChituDiffusion", spelled exactly with uppercase C and uppercase D, no spaces, no extra words. Wide 5:2 composition. Make the wordmark large and centered. Put the visual effects only on the letter strokes: subtle electric cyan inner glow, warm vermilion edge highlights, tiny diffusion particles emerging from parts of the letters, sleek technical research typography, crisp readable letters. The background must remain plain and quiet. No subtitle, no header bar, no watermark, no mascot, no animal, no additional text.
